title: X6851B-15.1.0.138SP11-OP001PF001AZ-15.1.2.127SP01-OP001PF001AZ_20251011100013
description:
Please plug in charger to OTA upgrade when power is lower than 50%.

Update Version:
X6851B-15.1.2.127SP01(OP001PF001AZ)

Changed Functions:
1. Upgraded from XOS 15.1.0 to XOS 15.1.2 for a smarter user interface that gives your device a new look.
2. Updated Google Security Patch to October 1, 2025.
3. Phone Cast: Added the feature to cast your phone screen to a tablet of the same brand. This allows you to enjoy a larger screen experience for work or entertainment, with the ability to view and operate your phone and seamlessly copy-paste text across devices.
4. AI Writing: Supported intelligent recognition of email contexts for automatic optimization of format and content. Provided scenario-based text polishing for social media posts.
5. Screenshot: Added a Smart Touch shortcut below the screenshot thumbnail, allowing easy recognition of QR codes on the page.
6. Mistouch Prevention for Pocket Mode: Optimized for the accidental touch issue in pocket mode during calls on third-party apps.
7. Battery and Power Saving: Enhanced visual design, simplified mode selection process, and improved the user experience.
8. Theme Store: Allowed changing theme designs for system apps like Phone, Contacts, and Messages.
9. Cloud Service: Added cloud storage, cloud drive, and space expansion, allowing users to upload personal data to the cloud, ensuring data security, and freeing up local storage space.

Fixed Issues:
1. Improved the system stability and running smoothness.

Reminding:
1. Optimized system stability and performance while fixing other issues.
2. Visit the XClub forum (https://www.infinix.club) for more information.
